recommendations.title: Percy Jackson: Sea of Monsters
recommendations.overview: In their quest to confront the ultimate evil, Percy and his friends battle swarms of mythical creatures to find the mythical Golden Fleece and to stop an ancient evil from rising.

recommendations.title: Hotel for Dogs
recommendations.overview: Placed in a foster home that doesn't allow pets, 16-year-old Andi and her younger brother, Bruce, turn an abandoned hotel into a home for their dog. Soon other strays arrive, and the hotel becomes a haven for every orphaned canine in town. But the ki

recommendations.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid
recommendations.overview: Greg Heffley is a scrawny but ambitious kid with an active imagination and big plans to be rich and famous – he just has to survive middle school first.

recommendations.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Rodrick Rules
recommendations.overview: Wimpy Greg Heffley, now in seventh grade, thinks he has it all together. He has mastered middle school and gotten rid of the Cheese Touch. However, Greg's older brother, Rodrick, is itching to cut him down to size. He gets the perfect opportunity whe

recommendations.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Rodrick Rules
recommendations.overview: As a new school year begins, Greg is subject to relentless teasing from his brother Rodrick. Will Greg manage to get along with him? Or will a secret ruin everything?

recommendations.title: Piper
recommendations.overview: A mother bird tries to teach her little one how to find food by herself. In the process, she encounters a traumatic experience that she must overcome in order to survive.

recommendations.title: A Grand Day Out
recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Comedy, Science Fiction, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Wallace and Gromit have run out of cheese, and this provides an excellent excuse for the duo to take their holiday to the moon, where, as everyone knows, there is ample cheese.

recommendations.title: Back to School
recommendations.overview: Two adults go to their middle school reunion in order to show off their success to old bullies teenage crushes.

recommendations.title: Misfit
